query:
SELECT EXISTS(
                SELECT 1 FROM (
                    SELECT c.organisation_id FROM campaign_roles r
                    JOIN campaigns c on r.campaign_id = c.id
                    WHERE r.id = $1
                ) cr
                JOIN organisation_members m on cr.organisation_id = m.organisation_id
                WHERE m.user_id = $2 AND m.role = 'Admin'
            )
